mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM sys_menu m LEFT JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.del_flag = '0' AND m.status = '0' ORDER BY m.menu_sort

SELECT DISTINCT m.perms FROM sys_menu m LEFT JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.del_flag = '0' AND m.status = '0' AND m.perms IS NOT NULL AND m.perms != ''
